summary.key_theme: Intel 面臨供應鏈緊縮與產品漲價壓力，且在 AI 領域競爭力受質疑，導致股價近期表現疲軟並遭機構投資人減持。

bullish.title: Can Intel's Core Ultra Series 3 Launch Propel Its Shares?
bullish.reason: Intel 推出 Core Ultra Series 3 處理器與 Arc Pro GPU，旨在透過 AI PC 產品線提升市場競爭力與營收動能。

bullish.title: INTC & CrowdStrike Team Up to Secure AI Adoption: Will it Fuel Growth?
bullish.reason: 與 CrowdStrike 合作強化 AI PC 安全性，有助於提升企業級客戶對 Intel 平台的採用意願。

bearish.title: Intel Price Hikes And Supply Strains Test Recent Share Momentum
bearish.reason: 供應鏈限制導致交貨週期延長，且被迫調漲 CPU 價格，恐影響終端需求與市占率。

bearish.title: Intel (INTC) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
bearish.reason: 股價單日重挫 6.53%，顯示市場對其基本面信心不足，拋售壓力大於大盤。

bearish.title: Nvidia, AMD and Intel Lead Chip Stocks Sell-Off Amid Middle East Tension
bearish.reason: 地緣政治風險加劇導致半導體類股集體下挫，Intel 作為指標股受避險情緒影響顯著。

bearish.title: Institutional Investors Are Selling One of Wall Street's Premier Trillion-Dollar Club Members
bearish.reason: 機構投資人持續減持 Intel，顯示專業投資機構對其未來成長前景持保留態度。

bearish.title: As Claude Deals Yet Another Blow, Here’s Why HP and Intel Are the Lowest-Rated IT Stocks to Buy
bearish.reason: AI 技術演進（如 Claude）對傳統硬體與軟體架構造成威脅，Intel 被評為 IT 領域中較不具吸引力的標的。

bearish.title: Teradyne, Applied Materials, Intel, KLA Corporation, and Semtech Shares Plummet
bearish.reason: 受 Google 新演算法 TurboQuant 消息影響，半導體設備與晶片股出現連鎖性下跌。

neutral.title: Intel vs AMD: Which is a Better Long-Term Buy?
neutral.reason: 針對 Intel 與 AMD 的長期投資價值進行比較分析，未提供明確買賣建議，屬中性觀點。

neutral.title: 3 Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stocks to Buy at a Discount
neutral.reason: 探討 AI 類股的折價機會，雖提及 Intel 相關產業，但未將其列為首選。
